title: Credit Crunch: Xponance’s McElreath on Credit Inefficiencies

summary: “The portfolio manager’s dilemma is, ‘Do I take risk, or do I not take risk?’” Noel McElreath, senior portfolio manager for US fixed income at Xponance, tells Bloomberg Intelligence’s Noel Hebert. “And then, ‘What is excess return telling me?’” On this episode of Credit Crunch, the pair discuss the importance of disciplined credit selection, exploiting structural inefficiencies and maintaining a long-term perspective. summary: A selloff in South Korean chipmakers drove global technology stocks lower, while oil and bond yields climbed after a fresh round of strikes in the Middle East over the weekend.

title: Investors Expect ‘Sunshine and Rainbows’ This Earnings Season
title_cn: 投资者期待本财报季“阳光和彩虹”
summary: Estimates are running up against sticky inflation and rising odds of interest rate hikes. With stocks near records, there’s little room for error.

title: Fed’s Bowman Urges Global Financial Watchdog to be Flexible
title_cn: 美联储鲍曼敦促全球金融监管机构保持灵活性
summary: The Federal Reserve’s top bank cop warned the Financial Stability Board against enforcing “strict rules” that are not suitable for a diverse group of countries, saying those efforts can erode the international watchdog’s effectiveness.

title: Germany’s Smag Sinks in Debut as Defense Stock Appetite Ebbs
title_cn: 由于国防股需求下降，德国 Smag 首次亮相就下跌
summary: Smag Mobile Antenna Masts AG shares tumbled as much as 33% below the initial public offering price in their German trading debut, marking the latest sign of waning demand for defense stocks in Europe.

title: Traders Grapple With World That’s Good for Dollar, Bad for Bonds
title_cn: 交易员努力应对对美元有利、对债券不利的世界
summary: What’s good for the US dollar isn’t always good for US bonds — but investors are finding ways to work around it.

title: Indonesia Avoids S&P Rating Outlook Cut in Win for Prabowo
title_cn: 印尼避免标普评级展望下调，普拉博沃胜出
summary: Indonesia retained its investment-grade rating and stable outlook at S&P Global Ratings, a reprieve for President Prabowo Subianto and his fiscal policy credibility after a bond market selloff in June.

title: UAE Steps Up Moves to Help Term Buyers Avoid Hormuz Transits
title_cn: 阿联酋加大力度帮助定期买家避免霍尔木兹过境
summary: Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. is broadening the options for long-term customers to take offshore oil from outside the Strait of Hormuz, stepping up efforts that enable buyers to circumvent the chokepoint.

title: Apple’s $600 Billion Rally Fueled by Traders Fleeing AI Selloff
title_cn: 交易员逃离人工智能抛售推动苹果股价上涨 6000 亿美元
summary: Investors are flocking back to Apple Inc. as nervousness about artificial intelligence spending weighs on the stocks of chipmakers and cloud-computing giants.

title: Maker of Soya Supreme Cooking Oil Plans Pakistan IPO This Month
title_cn: 大豆高级食用油制造商计划本月在巴基斯坦首次公开募股
summary: Cooking oil manufacturer Agro Processors & Atmospheric Gases Ltd. is planning an initial public offering in Pakistan this month to finance a plant expansion, adding to a record year for listings in the country.

title: CLO Fund’s 50% Tumble Fuels Power Struggle That Spills Into Open
title_cn: CLO 基金暴跌 50% 加剧权力斗争
summary: A fight over who gets to run a $580 million credit fund has erupted into an unusually public Wall Street brawl, pitting claims of poor performance against accusations of a cash grab ahead of a proxy vote later this month.

title: Wall Street to Warsh: Skip the Guidance, But Tell Us What You Think About the Economy
title_cn: 华尔街对沃什：跳过指导，但告诉我们您对经济的看法
summary: In his zeal to avoid signaling where interest rates are headed, Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh has obscured something else that’s crucial to investors, analysts and other policymakers: How he would react when challenged by the economy.

title: Treasury Two-Year Yields Rise to Highest Since 2025 as Oil Jumps
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，两年期国债收益率升至 2025 年以来最高
summary: Treasury two-year yields climbed to their highest level since early 2025 as renewed tensions in Iran pushed up oil prices, fanning speculation that the Federal Reserve will need to raise interest rates to combat inflation.

title: Deutsche Bank Boosts Gulf Team With Standard Chartered Hires
title_cn: 德意志银行通过渣打银行招聘来增强海湾团队
summary: Deutsche Bank AG is expanding its private banking business in Dubai with a series of hires from Standard Chartered Plc, further deepening its presence in the Middle East despite the regional conflict.

title: European Stocks Steady as Energy Gains Offset Tech Weakness
title_cn: 能源股上涨抵消了科技股的疲软，欧洲股市稳定
summary: European stocks were muted as declines in technology shares were offset by gains in the energy sector, which was lifted by higher oil prices.

title: Gold and Silver Drop as Mideast Strikes Heighten Rate-Hike Risks
title_cn: 中东袭击加剧加息风险，黄金和白银下跌
summary: Gold and silver tumbled after the US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes over the weekend, sending energy prices higher and once more raising the prospects for interest-rate hikes to combat inflation.

title: Saudi Tech Firm NourNet Is Said to Pick Goldman, HSBC for IPO
title_cn: 据称，沙特科技公司 NourNet 选择高盛和汇丰银行进行 IPO
summary: Saudi Arabia’s NourNet is working with Goldman Sachs Group Inc. and HSBC Holdings Plc on a potential initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a pipeline of Gulf listings despite the regional conflict.

title: India Trade Deficit Widens as Hormuz Uncertainty Clouds Outlook
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡的不确定性给印度前景蒙上阴影，印度贸易逆差扩大
summary: India’s trade deficit widened in June, with uncertainty over the US-Iran conflict and shipping through the Strait of Hormuz continuing to cloud the outlook for global supply chains.

title: Oil Rises as Conflict Over Hormuz Escalates With Fresh Strikes
title_cn: 霍尔木兹冲突升级，新一轮罢工导致油价上涨
summary: Oil gained after the US carried out another wave of strikes against Iran, with the two sides disputing whether the Strait of Hormuz was open.

title: China’s Oil Imports Poised to Recover as Stockpiling Returns
title_cn: 随着库存回升，中国石油进口有望恢复
summary: China’s crude imports look poised to recover from a months-long slump as the country relaxes fuel export curbs, raises run rates and snaps up prompt Middle East supplies, with analysts and traders forecasting a return to strategic stockpiling later this year.

title: James Bond Studio Pinewood in Talks on Sterling Debt Sale
title_cn: 詹姆斯·邦德工作室 Pinewood 就英镑债务出售进行谈判
summary: The UK film and TV studio behind the James Bond movies is meeting with investors ahead of a possible sale of sterling-denominated notes.

title: De Beers to Shutter South African Diamond Mine to Save Cash
title_cn: 戴比尔斯将关闭南非钻石矿以节省现金
summary: Diamond giant De Beers plans to halt production at its South African mine for two years, as the one-time monopoly continues to wrestle with one of the deepest crises to ever hit the industry.

title: As Milei’s Aura Fades, Argentina Starts to Look for a Third Way
title_cn: 米莱光环褪去，阿根廷开始寻找第三条路
summary: Corruption was once Javier Milei’s strongest card against the Peronist movement that dominated Argentine politics for decades. Now it’s just one of several vulnerabilities that are damaging the libertarian president’s brand and giving wings to the opposition’s comeback plans.

title: German Tax Trades Fallout May Cost Firms €7 Billion, BaFin Says
title_cn: BaFin 表示，德国税收交易的影响可能使企业损失 70 亿欧元
summary: German financial watchdog BaFin said financial companies that engaged in two controversial strategies to game dividend taxes are facing related legal and fiscal liabilities of as much €7.01 billion ($7.99 billion).

title: The Three Pillars of Graham's Legacy
title_cn: 格雷厄姆遗产的三大支柱
summary: From Donald Trump skeptic to one of the president's closest allies, Lindsey Graham spent decades shaping US foreign policy and the Republican Party. Here's a look at the South Carolina senator's political legacy following his death at 71. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Jumps as US Conducts Wave of Strikes Against Iran
title_cn: 美国对伊朗发动一波打击，油价飙升
summary: Global benchmark Brent rose above $79 a barrel while West Texas Intermediate edged toward $75 after US forces completed another wave of strikes against Iran, with the two sides disputing whether the Strait of Hormuz was open. Bloomberg's Stephen Stapczynski reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TSMC’s Sales Soar 36% in Latest Sign of AI Spending Momentum
title_cn: 人工智能支出势头最新迹象，台积电销售额飙升 36%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported a 36% jump in quarterly sales, meeting elevated expectations while signaling global demand for AI computing remains intact.

title: European Stocks 'Vulnerable' Without Solid Iran Deal: Schroders
title_cn: 施罗德：如果没有可靠的伊朗协议，欧洲股市将“脆弱”
summary: Remi Olu-Pitan, head of multi-asset growth and income at Schroders, discusses the outlook for US earnings and European stocks. "Europe in general tends to be the peace trade, and we're not getting a clear peace deal," Olu-Pitan tells Bloomberg Television. "It leaves Europe vulnerable." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Shares Plunge Most on Record in Deepening Korea Selloff
title_cn: 韩国抛售加剧，SK海力士股价创历史新高
summary: South Korea’s AI-fueled stock rally came under renewed pressure Monday as SK Hynix Inc. tumbled by a record 15%, underscoring growing investor concerns that the boom has become overstretched.

title: Akzo Nobel Rejects $8.6 Billion Nippon Offer for Paint Unit
title_cn: 阿克苏诺贝尔拒绝 Nippon 86 亿美元收购涂料部门的报价
summary: Akzo Nobel NV’s board rejected an offer from Nippon Paint Holdings Co. for its decorative paints business, and continued to recommend an agreed upon merger with Axalta Coating Systems Ltd.

title: Yen Falls on Report Japan Has No Plans to Change GPIF Allocation
title_cn: 日元下跌，因有报道称日本没有计划改变 GPIF 分配
summary: The yen weakened and Japanese government bonds extended losses after Reuters reported that Japan has no plans to overhaul the Government Pension Investment Fund’s asset allocation.

title: Researchers Raise Concerns That AI May Atrophy Human Skills
title_cn: 研究人员担心人工智能可能会削弱人类技能
summary: Will we end up with a generation of experts in high-stakes professions who never build true expertise?

title: Who’s Scamming the Scammers?
title_cn: 谁在欺骗骗子？
summary: Scambaiting is one way the fed-up masses are dealing with a flood of fraud.

title: Dyson’s New $100 Portable Fan Is Beating the Heat — and Sales Expectations
title_cn: 戴森 100 美元的新款便携式风扇正在消暑——和销售预期
summary: The newest status symbol on the streets of Manhattan is a high-tech portable fan that’s been hard to get hold of.

title: Meta’s Louisiana Data Center to Surpass $250 Billion Price Tag
title_cn: Meta 路易斯安那州数据中心的造价将超过 2500 亿美元
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has committed to spending an additional $40 billion on its sprawling data center campus in Louisiana, pushing its total expected investment beyond $250 billion for the site as it continues to grow its artificial intelligence computing footprint.

title: EU to Present Plan to Restrict Children’s Access to Social Media
title_cn: 欧盟将提出限制儿童使用社交媒体的计划
summary: The European Union will propose a law to restrict children’s access to social media, according to the bloc’s top official, as part of a growing global consensus about the harm it causes.

title: Raxio to Enter Tanzania With $380 Million Funding Push
title_cn: Raxio 斥资 3.8 亿美元进军坦桑尼亚
summary: Africa-focused data-center firm Raxio Group plans to enter Tanzania as it increases its funding pool to $380 million, Chief Executive Officer Robert Skjødt said.

title: Xi to Debut at China’s Flagship AI Summit as US Rivalry Heats Up
title_cn: 习近平将在中国人工智能旗舰峰会上首次亮相，美国竞争加剧
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping will make his first appearance at the country’s flagship AI conference, signaling the growing importance Beijing attaches to the technology as its rivalry with the US intensifies.

title: Saudi Arabia Becomes Top Buyer in Taiwan’s Young Drone Industry
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯成为台湾年轻无人机产业的最大买家
summary: Saudi Arabia bought a record $47.2 million of drones from Taiwan last month — a sign the island’s nascent UAV industry is becoming more attractive to buyers.

title: Why AI Might Actually Create More Work for Lawyers
title_cn: 为什么人工智能实际上可能为律师创造更多工作
summary: It seems obvious that among the many industries that AI might disrupt, the legal profession might face some of the most adverse outcomes. When clerical, research-based tasks like searching through databases and reading contracts are automated, what is left for lawyers to do and how might they justify all those billable hours? In this episode we speak with Gary Wingens, chair and partner at the law firm Lowenstein Sandler. He talks about how his firm is using AI and why he thinks the technology could end up increasing legal work for lawyers as costs come down, creating a sort of “Jevon's paradox” for lawsuits, deals and litigation. We also talk about the billable hours model and training junior talent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley’s Wilson Sees Profit Boost for Stocks Beyond Tech
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的威尔逊认为科技股以外的股票利润将得到提振
summary: US stocks beyond the technology giants are poised to report strong earnings this season, broadening the equity rally, according to Morgan Stanley strategists.

title: South Korea to Tap Record AI Tax Windfall to Fund Future Growth
title_cn: 韩国将利用创纪录的人工智能税收暴利为未来增长提供资金
summary: South Korea expects to reap a record tax windfall from the artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor boom, giving President Lee Jae Myung’s government fresh fiscal firepower to fund an ambitious investment agenda.

title: SK Hynix Shares Slump in South Korea After US Listing
title_cn: SK海力士在美国上市后韩国股价暴跌
summary: SK Hynix shares declined in Seoul on Monday after the memory chipmaker’s highly-anticipated US trading debut. The company’s $26.5 billion US offering was closely watched as a test of demand for overseas offerings as well as for the longevity of the artificial intelligence rally. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MiniMax Shares Slump After JPMorgan Cuts Target Price Further
title_cn: 摩根大通进一步下调目标价后 MiniMax 股价暴跌
summary: MiniMax Group Inc.’s shares plunged, after JPMorgan Chase & Co. slashed the Chinese AI model maker’s price target for the second time in less than a week on value dilution concerns caused by fresh fundraising.

title: How Once-Struggling SK Hynix Became a Trillion-Dollar Company
title_cn: 曾经陷入困境的 SK 海力士如何成为价值万亿美元的公司
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is hardly a household name. But the maker of memory chips, which two decades ago was struggling to survive, is now South Korea’s second-most valuable listed company, just behind Samsung Electronics Co.

title: アップルのMacチップ戦略転換、自動運転車の「失敗」がAI基盤築く－Power On
title_cn: 苹果Mac芯片战略转变，自动驾驶汽车“失败”为AI奠定基础 - Power On
summary: 中止した自動運転車開発の技術遺産。現在のAI競争力を支える意外な理由とは。

title: Hyundai Motor Workers Strike Over Bonuses, Robot Job Security
title_cn: 现代汽车工人因奖金和机器人工作保障而罢工
summary: Hyundai Motor Co. workers began a three-day partial strike on Monday as their union demands bigger bonuses following landmark deals at semiconductor companies, and seek guarantees jobs won’t be lost to AI and robots.

title: Netflix Combats Questions About Slowing Growth
title_cn: Netflix 回应有关增长放缓的问题
summary: Netflix’s growth is slowing. What comes next?

title: Apple’s M6, M7 and M8 Chips Show How AI Is Reshaping the Company
title_cn: 苹果的 M6、M7 和 M8 芯片展示了人工智能如何重塑公司
summary: Also: New Apple Pencils are coming.

title: OpenAI, Meta, SpaceXAI Compete for More Cost-Efficient AI Models
title_cn: OpenAI、Meta、SpaceXAI 争夺更具成本效益的人工智能模型
summary: Three prominent artificial intelligence developers released new models over the past week. They all promise to be more advanced, but their biggest immediate selling point may not be what they can do but how little they charge to do it.

title: Zhipu’s Chinese Founder Says Frontier AI Should Stay Open to All
title_cn: 智普创始人表示前沿人工智能应该向所有人开放
summary: The founder of Chinese AI lab Zhipu argued that frontier artificial intelligence should remain broadly accessible rather than controlled by select individuals, weighing in on a growing debate about the risks posed by ever more powerful models.

title: China EVs on Road Have Average Age of 1.8 Years, Newspaper Says
title_cn: 报纸称中国上路电动汽车平均车龄为 1.8 年
summary: Chinese electric vehicles on the road are on average just 1.8 years old, compared with 8.2 years for gasoline-powered cars, 21st Century Business Herald reported, citing a report by the China Association of Automobile Manufacturers and Hejun Consulting.

title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over AI Talent Fight
title_cn: 苹果因人工智能人才争夺战起诉 OpenAI
summary: Bloomberg Tech host Ed Ludlow says Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI reflects an intensifying battle for AI talent and hardware leadership, with Apple alleging former employees improperly took trade secrets as OpenAI expands its device ambitions. He also says SK Hynix expects AI memory demand to outpace supply, plans to increase US investment beyond $35 billion, and sees the next test for the AI boom coming as technology companies report earnings and investors assess whether spending is translating into profits. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Engineer’s ‘LOL’ Moment Set Stage for Legal Fight With Apple
title_cn: OpenAI 工程师的“哈哈”时刻为与苹果的法律斗争奠定了基础
summary: When iPhone engineer Chang Liu quit for a job at OpenAI’s nascent hardware division, Apple Inc. says he left with more than just years of experience.

title: Why Fox is ‘the most Disciplined’ Media Entertainment Company in the Streaming Era
title_cn: 为什么福克斯是流媒体时代“最自律”的媒体娱乐公司
summary: Media veteran Michael Wolf discusses Allen & Company’s annual Sun Valley Conference and breaks down the mega deals that are reshaping the entertainment industry. He explains why free ad-supported content is the unsung winner of the streaming wars, and digs into the ways AI is changing the value of content.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Looks for a Musk-Free Path to Space
title_cn: 欧洲寻找一条无麝香的太空之路
summary: Europe is competing with US, China and Russia to establish a sovereign space industry.

title: Long Night of Jakarta Raids Found Gold Bars, Wads of Cash
title_cn: 雅加达长夜突袭发现金条和大量现金
summary: Diners at de’Clan Signature, an eatery in the low-rise South Jakarta neighborhood of Cipete, knew something was up when heavily armed police converged upon the restaurant last Wednesday afternoon.

title: Hungary Is Poised to Oust President in Rollback of Orban Era
title_cn: 匈牙利准备罢黜总统，重返欧尔班时代
summary: Hungarian lawmakers are set to oust the Viktor Orban-allied president as Prime Minister Peter Magyar seeks a clean break from his nationalist predecessor.

title: Zelenskyy Removes Prime Minister as Allies Meet in Paris
title_cn: 盟友在巴黎举行会议时，泽伦斯基罢免了总理
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said he planned to replace Prime Minister Yuliia Svyrydenko as part of a broader change in “political strategy.” Zelenskyy is expected in Paris on Monday for a meeting of the so-called coalition of the willing, where Ukraine's allies are likely to discuss more aid for Kyiv including for air defense. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU to Sanction Sudan’s Gold Trade as Civil War Rages
title_cn: 内战愈演愈烈，欧盟将制裁苏丹黄金贸易
summary: The European Union is expected to approve new trade prohibitions on Sudan’s gold sector as the country’s civil war enters its fourth year.

title: Burnham Weighs Bigger Budget as Experts Lobby on Economy
title_cn: 专家游说经济，伯纳姆考虑增加预算
summary: Andy Burnham, the UK’s presumptive next prime minister, is considering unveiling a bolstered budget later this year as allies and experts seek to persuade him to pursue a land tax, public control of utilities and a more ambitious devolution strategy.

title: South Africa Says About 53,500 Migrants Returned or Deported in Crackdown
title_cn: 南非称大约 53,500 名移民在镇压中返回或被驱逐出境
summary: South Africa processed almost 53,500 foreign nationals for deportation or voluntary repatriation since last month, as the authorities act on pledges to speed up removals while warning vigilante groups to stop conducting illegal searches for undocumented foreigners.

title: Singapore Court Postpones French Teen’s Straw-Licking Case to July 30
title_cn: 新加坡法院将法国青少年舔吸管案推迟至 7 月 30 日审理
summary: SINGAPORE (AP) — A court case involving a French teen charged for filming himself licking a straw from a vending machine and then putting it back was postponed Monday as prosecutors sought to clarify if he could continue his studies if convicted.

title: What a Europe-Led NATO Would Look Like
title_cn: 欧洲领导的北约会是什么样子
summary: US allies no longer believe they can count on Washington to stand with them against Russia. They’re now urgently debating what it would take to go it alone.

title: France to Summon Russia Ambassador Over Cyber Attacks
title_cn: 法国因网络攻击传唤俄罗斯大使
summary: France will summon Russia’s ambassador in the coming days regarding a vast cyberattack and spying campaign in several European countries, Foreign Affairs Minister Jean-Noel Barrot said.

title: Fresh US-Iran Strikes Threaten Ceasefire; TMSC Sales Surge | Daybreak Europe 7/13/2026
title_cn: 美伊新一轮袭击威胁停火； TMSC 销售激增 |黎明欧洲 7/13/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, oil jumped after the US and Iran traded fresh strikes. US Central Command says dozens of targets were hit in one of the heaviest bombardments since an interim deal to end the war was signed in June. Tehran retaliated with attacks on US allies in the Persian Gulf and beyond.

SK Hynix shares fell more than 13% in Seoul, after its highly-anticipated US trading debut. The slump drove the benchmark Kospi 8% lower, triggering a brief circuit-breaker suspension. In Taiwan, TSMC reported a 36% jump in quarterly sales, in a sign that global demand for AI hardware remains intact.

Today's guest: Lale Akoner, eToro, Global Market Analyst. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Moscow Faces Second Day of Mass Ukrainian Drone Attacks
title_cn: 莫斯科面临乌克兰无人机大规模袭击的第二天
summary: Moscow faced a second day of large-scale Ukrainian drone attacks, with officials reporting hundreds of the unmanned craft flying toward the Russian capital and three fatalities in the surrounding region.

title: US and Iran Trade Fresh Strikes
title_cn: 美国和伊朗进行新的打击
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes overnight into Monday as they continued their tit-for-tat attacks while issuing conflicting declarations over whether the Strait of Hormuz was open to shipping. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Malaysia’s Anwar Weakened by Ally’s Landslide in Johor Elections
title_cn: 马来西亚安华因盟友在柔佛选举中获得压倒性胜利而削弱
summary: Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s grip over Malaysia‘s ruling alliance took a hit over the weekend after coalition partner Barisan Nasional swept elections in Johor, strengthening the former ruling bloc’s hand as the government weighs whether to call an early general election.

title: Why Private Markets Hold the Next Generation of AI Winners
title_cn: 为什么私募市场拥有下一代人工智能赢家
summary: Anthropic, Stripe and OpenAI are some of the world's most sought-after private companies. Maggie Fanari explains to host Merryn Somerset Webb how her team invests in them and similar firms before they reach public markets. Fanari is chief executive of J. Rothschild Capital Management, which manages the £4.5 billion ($6 billion) RIT Capital Partners trust. She shares why she believes the next wave of artificial intelligence could create a $60 trillion opportunity, why private markets are becoming increasingly important, and where she sees the biggest investment opportunities over the next decade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ships Transit the Strait of Hormuz in Secret
title_cn: 船只秘密通过霍尔木兹海峡
summary: A steady stream of ships has passed through the Strait of Hormuz in secret in recent days, while observable traffic has dwindled. Shipowners’ preference to go dark when pushing through Hormuz comes as the US and Iran exchange tit-for-tat attacks and also offer competing narratives of who is in charge of the strait. Bloomberg's Anthony di Paola reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US and Iran Trade Fresh Strikes, Dispute Whether Hormuz Is Open
title_cn: 美国和伊朗进行新的打击，对霍尔木兹是否开放存在争议
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes overnight into Monday as they continued their tit-for-tat attacks while issuing conflicting declarations over whether the Strait of Hormuz was open to shipping.

title: Malaysia Top Court Clears Former Youth Minister of Graft Charges
title_cn: 马来西亚最高法院撤销前青年部长的贪污指控
summary: Malaysia’s top court upheld former youth and sports minister Syed Saddiq Abdul Rahman’s acquittal, bringing an end to his graft case involving his former party’s funds.

title: CA Budget ‘Kneecapped’ Hollywood Tax Credit, Lawmakers
title_cn: 加州预算“跪着”好莱坞税收抵免，立法者
summary: A California business tax credit cap aimed at saving $4 billion threatens to drive away film and television production, according to a letter signed by a bipartisan group of lawmakers who demanded a quick fix to the budget signed by Governor Gavin Newsom.

title: Why Australia’s Superannuation System Has Caught Trump’s Attention
title_cn: 为什么澳大利亚的养老金制度引起了特朗普的关注
summary: At A$4.4 trillion ($3.1 trillion), Australia’s pension system is the fourth-largest pool of retirement savings in the world — and the fastest-growing among major markets. It’s expected to overtake the UK and Canada by the early 2030s to become the second-largest globally.

title: DOJ Investigating Allegations Against UAW President Fain
title_cn: 美国司法部正在调查针对 UAW 主席费恩的指控
summary: The US Justice Department launched a grand jury investigation into allegations that the head of the United Auto Workers pressured another high-ranking union official to secure benefits for his fiancée and her sister, according to internal communications within the labor organization.

title: Graham Death Sets Up Succession Drama in South Carolina
title_cn: 格雷厄姆之死在南卡罗来纳州引发了继任戏剧
summary: The sudden death of US Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carolina sets up a succession drama in the deeply conservative state that risks throwing the race into chaos less than four months before the midterm elections.

title: McConnell Explains Absence by Saying He Suffered Fall Weeks Ago
title_cn: 麦康奈尔解释缺席原因，称他几周前摔倒了
summary: Senator Mitch McConnell said he suffered a fall in June and contracted pneumonia that required hospitalization, breaking a lengthy silence that triggered weeks of speculation about his health.

title: Lindsey Graham’s Death Deprives Ukraine of Key Trump Whisperer
title_cn: 林赛·格雷厄姆的去世使乌克兰失去了特朗普的关键人物
summary: The death of Senator Lindsey Graham leaves key US allies like Ukraine, which have at times struggled to influence the Trump administration, without one of their most effective conduits to the White House.

title: US Says It Launched New Round of Strikes Against Iran on Sunday
title_cn: 美国称周日对伊朗发动新一轮打击
summary: The US military launched additional strikes against Iran Sunday aimed at further weakening the Islamic Republic’s ability to strike civilian vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, the US Central Command said.

title: Lindsey Graham, Senate Hawk Turned Trump Ally, Dies at 71
title_cn: 林赛·格雷厄姆，参议院鹰派变成特朗普盟友，去世，享年 71 岁
summary: Lindsey Graham, the South Carolina senior senator and foreign policy hawk who changed from a Donald Trump skeptic to one of the US president’s strongest allies, died on Saturday. He was 71.

title: Zelenskyy Cabinet Shakeup Puts Kyiv’s Winter Resilience in Focus
title_cn: 泽伦斯基内阁改组将基辅的冬季恢复能力置于焦点
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s surprise move to overhaul his government and potentially install an energy executive as prime minister is the latest sign of the Ukrainian president’s determination to spare his war-weary nation a repeat of last winter’s hardships.
